description:
Phase 4 implements the integrated scope-completion pipeline: quiescent dirty-state remediation, full validation, scope-level review with fix-forward work creation, and the tightened `completed` stop condition.

## Goals

1. Tighten bounded epic loop: `completed` only after integrated validation + scope review have no unresolved `fix` findings
2. Implement quiescent dirty-state remediation pass (LLM-based, runs before validation)
3. Run configured validation commands once at scope completion on the integrated checkout
4. Run scope-complete review pass with epic/scope context
5. Implement fix-forward work creation for scope-level `fix` findings (beadwork children + new workers)
6. Cap scope-level fix iterations at 2 rounds; route to `attention` if not converged

## Key Design Constraints

- Scope-completion verification starts only when: no remaining ready work, all tickets terminal, no workers launching/running, no exited-unverified workers
- This is a required behavior change: current code can stop `completed` when all children are closed without proving no workers are in flight
- Dirty-state remediation runs BEFORE validation: confirms checkout is clean, or runs an LLM pass to commit/fix/discard/escalate abandoned state
- Dirty-state pass is NOT a file-locking system or active-worker guard — only a quiescent cleanup step
- Scope-complete review is fix-forward: previously verified worker records stay verified; new findings create new beadwork work
- Scope reviewer receives epic description, verified tickets with attributed commits, validation output — uses subagents to inspect actual code
- For standalone `/bw delegate <ticket>`: ticket IS the scope, run validation once, NO extra scope-complete review beyond normal worker-completion review
- `fix`: create child task + launch worker when safe
- `file`: create follow-up without blocking
- `reject`: discard invalid feedback

## Files likely affected

- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/orchestrator.ts` — loop stop condition + scope verification flow
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/types.ts` — scope-verification state types
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/handoff.ts` — dirty-state remediation + scope-review prompts
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/bw.ts` — creating fix-forward child tasks
- `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/__tests__/` — scope-completion regression suite

## Definition of Done

- `/bw run` does not stop as `completed` while workers are active/exited-unverified/scope-validation-pending
- Dirty-state pass runs at quiescence, never while workers active
- Validation runs once at scope completion
- Scope review creates fix-forward tasks, does not reopen verified workers
- 2-round cap on scope-level fixes
- Standalone `/bw delegate` treats single ticket as scope
- Worktree mode scope behavior preserved
- lint/test/typecheck pass clean
title: Phase 4: Scope-completion validation and review
